title: chamaegastrodia asraoa
intro: Chamaegastrodia asraoa is a species of orchid native to the Himalayan region, particularly in Nepal, Bhutan, and parts of India. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Chamaegastrodia asraoa include its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and various respiratory issues, such as cough and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are commonly used to make infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
